open MeasureTheory Filter Function TopologicalSpace
open scoped ENNReal

namespace ProbabilityTheory

variable {О№ О© E : Type*} [LinearOrder О№] [TopologicalSpace О№]
  [NormedAddCommGroup E] [NormedSpace в„қ E] [CompleteSpace E]
  {mО© : MeasurableSpace О©} {P : Measure О©}
  {X Y : О№ вҶ’ О© вҶ’ E} {рқ“• : Filtration О№ mО©}

/-- A square integrable martingale is a martingale with cadlag paths and uniformly bounded
second moments. -/
structure IsSquareIntegrable (X : О№ вҶ’ О© вҶ’ E) (рқ“• : Filtration О№ mО©) (P : Measure О©) : Prop where
  martingale : Martingale X рқ“• P
  cadlag : вҲҖ Пү, IsCadlag (X В· Пү)
  bounded : вЁҶ i, eLpNorm (X i) 2 P < вҲһ

lemma IsSquareIntegrable.integrable_sq (hX : IsSquareIntegrable X рқ“• P) (i : О№) :
    Integrable (fun Пү вҶҰ вҖ–X i ПүвҖ– ^ 2) P := by
  constructor
  В· have hX_meas := (hX.martingale.adapted i).mono (рқ“•.le i)
    fun_prop
  В· have hX_bound : eLpNorm (X i) 2 P < вҲһ := by
      calc eLpNorm (X i) 2 P
      _ вүӨ вЁҶ j, eLpNorm (X j) 2 P := le_iSup (fun j вҶҰ eLpNorm (X j) 2 P) i
      _ < вҲһ := hX.bounded
    simpa [HasFiniteIntegral, eLpNorm_lt_top_iff_lintegral_rpow_enorm_lt_top] using hX_bound

lemma IsSquareIntegrable.add (hX : IsSquareIntegrable X рқ“• P)
    (hY : IsSquareIntegrable Y рқ“• P) :
    IsSquareIntegrable (fun i Пү вҶҰ X i Пү + Y i Пү) рқ“• P := by
  refine вҹЁhX.martingale.add hY.martingale, fun Пү вҶҰ ?_, ?_вҹ©
  В· sorry
  В· have hX_bound : вЁҶ i, eLpNorm (X i) 2 P < вҲһ := hX.bounded
    have hY_bound : вЁҶ i, eLpNorm (Y i) 2 P < вҲһ := hY.bounded
    calc вЁҶ i, eLpNorm (fun Пү вҶҰ X i Пү + Y i Пү) 2 P
        вүӨ вЁҶ i, (eLpNorm (X i) 2 P + eLpNorm (Y i) 2 P) := by
          refine iSup_mono fun i вҶҰ ?_
          exact eLpNorm_add_le ((hX.martingale.adapted i).mono (рқ“•.le i)).aestronglyMeasurable
            ((hY.martingale.adapted i).mono (рқ“•.le i)).aestronglyMeasurable (by simp)
      _ вүӨ (вЁҶ i, eLpNorm (X i) 2 P) + вЁҶ i, eLpNorm (Y i) 2 P := by
          sorry

The goal at the `sorry` is:
`вҠў вЁҶ i, eLpNorm (X i) 2 P + eLpNorm (Y i) 2 P вүӨ (вЁҶ i, eLpNorm (X i) 2 P) + вЁҶ i, eLpNorm (Y i) 2 P`

This is trivially true. The left side is `a + b` and the right side is `a + b`. This can be solved by `simp` or `linarith`.
